# COMPRESSION_STREAM_FINALIZE

**Global Variable**

Indicates that the operation will add no further input blocks to the stream.

## Declaration

```swift
var COMPRESSION_STREAM_FINALIZE: compression_stream_flags { get }
```
title: COMPRESSION_STREAM_FINALIZE
